title: gilibertia juergensenii
intro: Gilibertia juergensenii, also known as Desert Marigold or Mexican Gold Poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gilibertia juergensenii include relief from muscle spasms, pain, and fever, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
